answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like solving problems & thinking analytically
Data analysis, AI, or machine learning

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in full stack developer to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: freeCodeCamp Full Stack Curriculum (Multiple Certifications)
IBM Full Stack Cloud Developer Professional Certificate on Coursera
The Complete 2024 Web Development Bootcamp (Angela Yu) on Udemy
Professional Certificate in Full Stack Web Development (HKUST) on edX
Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer Professional Certificate

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in frontend frameworks (react, vue.js, angular), backend frameworks (node.js, django, spring boot), and database management (sql and nosql) — these are the essential building blocks for a full stack developer

resources.title: freeCodeCamp Responsive Web Design Certification
MDN Web Docs: JavaScript Guide
Coursera: Python for Everybody Specialization (University of Michigan)
W3Schools SQL Tutorial
GitHub Git Handbook

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in api development and integration, version control (git), and cloud infrastructure and deployment, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Advanced React Development & Performance Optimization
Cloud Computing Fundamentals (AWS/Azure/GCP Learning Paths)
DevOps, Docker, and Kubernetes Introduction
System Design Primer (Scalability & Architecture)
Advanced Database Management Systems and Optimization

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying frontend frameworks (react, vue.js, angular), and backend frameworks (node.js, django, spring boot) in realistic scenarios

resources.title: freeCodeCamp - Build Projects to Earn Certificates
MDN Web Docs - Web Development Learning Paths and Tutorials
Udemy - Search for Full-Stack Project Courses
GitHub - MERN Stack Topic (Project Boilerplates & Examples)
Traversy Media - Full-Stack Development Project Tutorials (YouTube)

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

resources.title: freeCodeCamp: Responsive Web Design Certification (includes Portfolio Project)
Udemy: Search for 'Full Stack Projects' (Course Ideas)
GitHub Topics: Portfolio Website (Project Inspiration & Examples)
Traversy Media YouTube Channel (Full Stack Project Builds)
MDN Web Docs: Learn Web Development (Foundational Project Knowledge)

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your full stack developer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: Professional Resume & CV Writing
Building a Standout Developer Portfolio
Optimizing Your GitHub Profile and Project READMEs
LinkedIn Profile Optimization for Tech Professionals
Crafting an Effective Developer Cover Letter

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for full stack developer positions on job boards, company career pages, and freelance platforms (Upwork, Fiverr, Toptal) — tailor each application to the role and be ready to showcase your portfolio in interviews

milestones.title: Foundation & Core Skills
milestones.description:
(Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in full stack developer to build a strong learning foundation

Then: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in frontend frameworks (react, vue.js, angular), backend frameworks (node.js, django, spring boot), and database management (sql and nosql) — these are the essential building blocks for a full stack developer

resources.title: Responsive Web Design Certification (freeCodeCamp)
Google IT Automation with Python Professional Certificate (Coursera)
The Complete JavaScript Course From Zero to Expert! (Udemy)
Introduction to Computer Science (Khan Academy)

milestones.title: Skill Building & Practice
milestones.description:
Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in api development and integration, version control (git), and cloud infrastructure and deployment, applying them through exercises and case studies

Then: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying frontend frameworks (react, vue.js, angular), and backend frameworks (node.js, django, spring boot) in realistic scenarios

resources.title: MDN Web Docs (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Web Concepts)
freeCodeCamp Full-Stack Development Curriculum
Udemy - Web Development Course Category
GitHub Guides (Learn Git and GitHub)

milestones.title: Portfolio & Professional Profile
milestones.description:
Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

Then: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your full stack developer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators
